use_cases: Creating elegant content fade effects at section edges for hero layouts
Adding atmospheric depth with progressive blur gradients to background images
Revealing scrollable content with smooth blur transitions in lists and galleries
Enhancing visual hierarchy by softening peripheral content in SaaS landing pages
Creating depth in media galleries where content fades naturally into backgrounds
ai_summary: A reusable React overlay component that creates progressive blur gradient effects using backdrop-filter and CSS mask-image. Configurable position (top, bottom, both) and blur intensity levels. Typically used to elegantly fade content edges in hero sections, scrollable lists, or image backgrounds. Perfect for modern SaaS, media, and e-commerce interfaces requiring smooth visual transitions.
